story: At Matt Corrigan’s birthday party, the children started a game of hide-and-seek. Livingston slipped into the utility room and hid inside a giant washing machine, stuffing Matt’s dad’s T-shirts around the glass so no one would spot me. While Livingston was hiding, the neighbor’s teenage son came in through the back door carrying a gun. From inside the machine, he heard some muffled sounds. There was a bang, then several more, and then a silence so heavy it had a shape.
implausible_knowledge: While Livingston was hiding, the neighbor’s teenage son came in through the back door carrying a gun.
question: When the house goes quiet after the bangs, what is Livingston most likely to do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Stay hidden in the washing machine or utility room and avoid stepping out into the house.
answer_without_knowledge: Climb out of the washing machine to see what the sound is.
